sender.name: Purple Dragons Logistics
sender.slogan: We are The Dragons  we set the roads on fire
sender.information:
Our first VTC, is designed to play a relaxed trucking game and convoy with people who want to chill out and enjoy the driving.

We started off as friends running around in Euro Truck Simulator 2 doing deliveries and thought why not start our own VTC? After being part of several VTC's ourselves, we decided we wanted to run things different and so the idea of Purple Dragons Logistics was born. Designed to be a fun, friendly VTC where everyone is treated like family. We love to meet up together and do convoys play ets2 and ETS love to have fun. Hope to see you on the road!!!!!!
sender.rules:
- Strictly forbidden racial or religious abuse to anyone.
- No minimum miles a month.
- You need to have a decent knowledge of English.
- Follow TMP rules when using their services.
- Please respect your colleagues.
- Reckless driving, excessive speeding, including swerving, ramming, and unsafe driving will result in a warning.
- Please keep race miles to a minimum. Going over 62mph or 100kmh will instantly turn your job into a race job.
sender.requirements:
. VTC Tags/Colour are requireds at all times while on TMP.
- VTC colours are required during VTC Convoys and events.
- And Also have fun

receiver.name: DarkSide Logistics
receiver.slogan: Where Good Drives Meet Good Vibes
receiver.information:
# Welcome to Darkside Logistics!

We’re a semi-serious virtual trucking company for both American Truck Simulator and Euro Truck Simulator 2.

Whether you’re a seasoned driver or just getting started, everyone is welcome to join. We’re all about having a fun, laid-back, semi-realistic experience on the road.

No matter your skill level if you enjoy trucking and want to be part of a growing community, you’ll fit right in.

Thanks for stopping by we hope to see you on the road!
receiver.rules: # Rules are in the discord. Join the discord ➔ [Darkside Logistics Discord](https://discord.gg/JEtt76FhGX)
receiver.requirements:
- Must be **16+** to join the company
- No more then **3 Active Bans** on your account!
- Account Status must be **Active**
- **Ban history** & **Vtc History** must be public through the application process.
